languages.text: "Спасибо, что спасли мою жизнь, Лорд-капитан". {n}Хрипло бормочет бледный как полотно Мартинакс. Прижимая руку к окровавленной голове, он неловко кланяется.{/n} "Прошу простить, но мое присутствие нужно в операционной. Генетор Ферренц в плохом состоянии..."

"Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."
languages.original_text: "Спасибо, что спасли мою жизнь, Лорд-капитан". {n}Хрипло бормочет бледный как полотно Мартинакс. Прижимая руку к окровавленной голове, он неловко кланяется.{/n} "Прошу простить, но мое присутствие нужно в операционной. Генетор Ферренц в плохом состоянии..."

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

"Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

"Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

languages.text: 「命を救ってくれてありがとう、キャプテン様」{n}マルティナクスは血の滲む頭を押さえ、顔を真っ赤にして敬礼する。{/n}「申し訳ありませんが、手術室に私が必要とされています。ジェネトル・フェレンツは重篤な状態です…」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: 「命を救ってくれてありがとう、キャプテン様。」{n}マルティナクスは血の滲む頭を押さえ、顔を真っ赤にして敬礼する。{n}「申し訳ありませんが、手術室に私が必要とされています。ジェネトル・フェレンツは重篤な状態です…」

languages.text: "Hayatımı kurtardığınız için teşekkür ederim Lord Kaptan." {n}Martinax, kireç gibi bembeyaz bir hâlde hırıldıyor. Elini kanlı kafasına bastırarak beceriksizce eğiliyor.{/n} "Lütfen beni mazur görün ama ameliyathaneye gitmem gerekiyor. Genetör Ferrenz'in durumu ağır..."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: "Hayatımı kurtardığınız için teşekkür ederim Lord Kaptan." {n}Martinax, kireç gibi bembeyaz bir hâlde hırıldıyor. Elini kanlı kafasına bastırarak beceriksizce eğiliyor.{/n} "Lütfen beni mazur görün ama ameliyathaneye gitmem gerekiyor. Genetör Ferrenz'in durumu ağır..."

languages.text: «Gracias por salvarme la vida, Lord Capitán». {n}Martinax dice con voz ronca, blanco como la nieve. Se lleva una mano a la cabeza ensangrentada y te hace una reverencia torpe.{/n} «Discúlpeme, se requiere mi presencia en la cámara de operaciones. El Genetor Ferrenz está muy grave...».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por salvarme la vida, Lord Capitán». {n}Martinax dice con voz ronca, blanco como la nieve. Se lleva una mano a la cabeza ensangrentada y te hace una reverencia torpe.{/n} «Discúlpeme, se requiere mi presencia en la cámara de operaciones. El Genetor Ferrenz está muy grave...».

languages.text: “感谢您的救命之恩，舰长大人。”{n}马丁纳克斯面如白纸，嘶哑地说道。他一只手按住血流不止的头，笨拙地鞠了一躬。{/n}“请原谅，手术室那边需要我——基因士费伦茨目前伤情危急……”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的救命之恩，舰长大人。”{n}马丁纳克斯面如白纸，嘶哑地说道。他一只手按住血流不止的头，笨拙地鞠了一躬。{/n}“请原谅，手术室那边需要我——基因士费伦茨目前伤情危急……”

languages.text: « Merci de m'avoir sauvé la vie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, » {n}déclare Martinax d'une voix rauque, blanc comme un linge. Une main pressée contre sa tête ensanglantée, il vous adresse une révérence maladroite.{/n} « Je vous prie de m'excuser, mais ma présence est requise dans la salle d'opération. Le genetor Ferrenz est dans un état critique... »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

traits.locale_text: « Merci de m'avoir sauvé la vie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, » {n}déclare Martinax d'une voix rauque, blanc comme un linge. Une main pressée contre sa tête ensanglantée, il vous adresse une révérence maladroite.{/n} « Je vous prie de m'excuser, mais ma présence est requise dans la salle d'opération. Le genetor Ferrenz est dans un état critique... »

languages.text: "Danke, dass Ihr mir das Leben gerettet habt, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax keucht, bleich wie ein Laken. Er drückt eine Hand gegen seinen blutigen Kopf und verbeugt sich ungeschickt.{/n} "Bitte entschuldigt mich, aber in der Operationskammer ist meine Anwesenheit erforderlich. Genetor Ferrenz ist in einem schlimmen Zustand ..."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."

Er drückt eine Hand gegen seinen blutigen Kopf und verbeugt sich ungeschickt.{/n} "Bitte entschuldigt mich, aber in der Operationskammer ist meine Anwesenheit erforderlich. Genetor Ferrenz ist in einem schlimmen Zustand ..."
